entity: Wes Unseld career GP must equal the clean profile total and clean BBR-resolved season sum (984).

composite.sql: SELECT SUM(gp) AS career_gp FROM fact_player_season_stat_resolved WHERE person_id = 78392 AND is_playoffs = false

notes: Both sub-assertions go through queryObjects, which serialises summed integer columns to JSON strings. The profile resolver and raw clean source aggregation must agree at BBR's 984 GP.
